summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Storybook Vault application including admin authentication, PDF upload/conversion, Preview Studio with 3-panel layout, settings customization, publishing, and customer viewing experience. All core features tested successfully.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation controls (prev/next buttons) may be hidden on hover-out or timeout in Preview Studio
ui_bugs.details: Controls work when visible, but visibility timing might need adjustment for better UX

issues: Premium magical design with Playfair Display font and warm color palette implemented correctly
affected_screen: All pages show proper magical theme with warm colors and premium design elements

passed_tests: Dashboard displays correctly with empty state and populated state
Search and filter functionality on dashboard
PDF upload dialog validation and UX flow
PDF to flipbook conversion works correctly
Preview Studio opens with proper 3-panel layout
Settings panel with all customization options (view mode, effects, sound, navigation, styling)
Publish panel with share link and password protection
Customer viewer loads and displays storybooks correctly
Navigation controls work in customer viewer
Mobile responsive design tested and working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor UI timing issue with navigation controls
